title: holcus aciculatus
intro: Holcus aciculatus, also known as hairy grama or hairy grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Holcus aciculatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Holcus aciculatus is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in various herbal preparations, including salves and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
